tasks.component_responsibility: Create the storage file with a default structure upon first execution
tasks.description: Initialize the storage file at the configured path with default permissions (0644) and JSONL structure containing id:uuid and created_at:timestamp fields. Handles configuration parameters (storage_file_path, storage_file_format, storage_permissions, backup_enabled, backup_path).
completion_criteria: Storage file exists at the specified path
Storage file permissions match the configured storage_permissions (0644)
Storage file contains the default structure with id and created_at fields

tasks.component_responsibility: Append a new task record to the storage file
tasks.description: Generate a new task record with a UUID and timestamp, validate input data against error handling strategies (validation_error), and append the record to the storage file. Implements backup logic if enabled.
completion_criteria: New task record is successfully appended to the storage file
Validation errors are caught and returned with appropriate status code
Backup copy is created if backup_enabled is true

tasks.component_responsibility: Read the storage file and retrieve all stored task records
tasks.description: Read the storage file and parse JSONL records into a list of task objects. Handles file not found errors gracefully.
completion_criteria: All stored task records are retrieved and returned
File read errors are handled with appropriate status code

tasks.component_responsibility: Update the status attribute of a specific task record to 'completed'
tasks.description: Read the storage file, locate the specific task record by ID, update the status attribute to 'completed', and write the changes back. Handles not_found errors for invalid task IDs.
completion_criteria: Task record status is updated to 'completed'
Changes are persisted to the storage file
Not found errors are returned for invalid task IDs

tasks.component_responsibility: Delete a specific task record from the storage file upon command
tasks.description: Read the storage file, locate the specific task record by ID, remove the record, and write the updated file. Handles not_found errors for invalid task IDs.
completion_criteria: Task record is removed from the storage file
Changes are persisted to the storage file
Not found errors are returned for invalid task IDs

tasks.component_responsibility: Parse command line arguments to validate inputs
tasks.description: Parse command line arguments using the configured argument_delimiter and strict_mode. Validates inputs against API definitions and returns validation errors if strict_mode is true.
completion_criteria: Command line arguments are successfully parsed
Validation errors are returned for invalid inputs if strict_mode is true

tasks.component_responsibility: Output all stored task records to standard output
tasks.description: Retrieve task records from COMP-001 and format them for standard output. Handles rendering status queries.
completion_criteria: Task records are formatted and written to standard output
Output matches standard I/O output formatting requirements
